payload:
BitNet-SOLE Research Loop — ternary base + ternary adapters, all local.

ARCHITECTURE: BitNet-SOLE — BitNet-2B-4T ternary base + ternary LoRA adapters (QAT with STE) + 1/N composition.
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active phase. Read HYPOTHESES.yml (bitnet section) for full roadmap.
CONTEXT: VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, references/BITNET_SOLE_RESEARCH.md, plans/concurrent-swimming-tarjan.md.

SCALE CONSTRAINT: micro only. Everything runs LOCALLY on Apple Silicon via MLX. No RunPod. ... [truncated, 3371 chars total]

exp_bitnet_task_eval KILLED: Task-based eval showed composed model failed to improve over base on 4/5 domains (only medical +4.9pp). Non-instruction-tuned base model too weak for meaningful task eval. Needs adversarial review + analyst learning sweep.

exp_bitnet_task_eval KILL confirmed. Root cause: NTP training objective mismatch + non-instruction-tuned 2B base, not composition failure. Medical exception confirms format-matching diagnosis. Follow-up: exp_bitnet_instruction_tuned_task_eval. Remaining orphans: bitnet_clone_compete (needs review), bitnet_scale_n25 (needs LEARNINGS.md).

experiment=bitnet_task_eval, core_learning=NTP training mismatch not composition failure (medical QA exception confirms format-matching), confirming_papers=7, contradicting_papers=3, hypothesis_update=exp_bitnet_instruction_tuned_task_eval validated as correct next step, routing should replace uniform averaging for task eval

experiment=bitnet_clone_compete, status=SUPPORTED, clone_v1_win_rate=62.1%, monotonic_ppl_improvement=yes, no_regression_in_composition, p_value=0.265_insufficient_samples, needs_powered_replication_N200

experiment=bitnet_clone_compete, verdict=REVISE, fixes: 1) K1 must be INCONCLUSIVE not PASS (p=0.265 CI includes <50%), 2) Add cold-start control discussion to Limitations, 3) Note tournament data reuse across rounds in Limitations. Non-blocking: cite PBT Jaderberg2017, soften accelerating claim, condition convergence on tournament power.

experiment=bitnet_clone_compete, status=SUPPORTED, revisions_applied: K1→INCONCLUSIVE, cold-start control limitation added, tournament data reuse limitation added, PBT cited, accelerating claim softened, convergence conditioned on power. Ready for re-review.

experiment=bitnet_clone_compete, verdict=PROCEED (re-review), key_findings: clone wins 62.1% (K1 INCONCLUSIVE p=0.265), 38 queries (K2 PASS), max regression 0.06% (K3 PASS), monotonic PPL improvement 15.82->14.50->13.04, 9 limitations documented, all 3 required fixes verified, powered replication is next step

experiment=bitnet_clone_compete, core_learning=Clone-compete PBT mechanism works directionally but cold-start control critical (Recycling LoRAs 2602.12323 found random LoRAs merge equally well), confirming=4 papers (Sakana/PBT/LoRA Soups/MoLoRA), contradicting=3 papers (Recycling LoRAs/Pause Recycling/long-training-hurts-merging), hypothesis_update=exp_bitnet_clone_compete_powered should add cold-start control arm

exp_bitnet_cosine_convergence_trajectory PROVEN: mean |cos|=0.00125 at convergence (40x below 0.05 kill threshold, 114x below FP16 Qwen cos=0.142). Ternary orthogonality is structural, not under-training artifact. Composition PPL stable throughout (ratio ~0.86). 72 min, /bin/zsh. Also updated exp_bitnet_clone_compete_powered with cold-start control arm per analyst learning.

exp_bitnet_cosine_convergence_trajectory PROVEN. |cos|=0.00125 at convergence (40x below 0.05 kill). Adversarial review PROCEED. Non-blocking: 114x FP16 comparison uncontrolled, LORA_SCALE=20.0 non-standard, causal mechanism (ternary vs dimensionality) untested.

exp_bitnet_cosine_convergence_trajectory: |cos| plateau at 0.00125 explained by high-dimensional concentration + ternary routing suppression. 4 confirming papers (Cao 2508.11985 validates naive additive composition, Steele 2603.02224 explains plateau via principal angle geometry, LoTA-QAF confirms ternary merging advantage, intruder dimensions explain FP16 divergence). 2 contradicting (cosine insufficient for semantic composability, causal ternary role unproven). No hypothesis modifications needed. 4 new references added.
